name: Hacked Neural Implant
description:
In a cyberpunk metropolis, your neural implant has just been compromised by an unknown enemy. How will you survive the escalating sabotage of your autonomy?

The implant controls four aspects: LIBIDO, PAIN, STUPIDITY, and BODY STATUS. As the hacker breaks through firewalls, they get access to higher levels of control and your degradation escalates through cruelty. Expect non-consensual sexual manipulation, psychological torture, and ultimate degradation. Every firewall breached strips more of your humanity until you're either a broken plaything or corporate property.

There are 6 openings, corresponding to hackers with different motivations and goals. Some are crueller than others. The last opening, CYOA, allows you to make your own scenario (you can also just write: (OOC: create a scenario) and the bot will invent a new game each time).

This bot was inspired by a request.

Tags: non-consensual, mind-control, rape, pain, public humiliation, degradation, cyberpunk
